title: Custom email to update function allowable by admins
excerpt: Please create an account setting that allows admins to give permission to users to create custom email addresses for boards/items. Admins do not have the need or time to create custom emails when users need them. We trus…

posts.author: russadk (Russ)
posts.cookedHtml: Please create an account setting that allows admins to give permission to users to create custom email addresses for boards/items. Admins do not have the need or time to create custom emails when users need them. We trust our users to know when this is appropriate and prefer the ability to delegate this.
